title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five categories: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost and speed. He argues that asking which tool to use is the wrong question and suggests practitioners should focus energy elsewhere, presenting an undeniable test and common layer analysis to inform the choice.
